maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday August 20, 2020 at 09:27

did.abstract: The collection contains primarily political, military, and commemorative ephemera, including but not limited to pins, ribbons, buttons, cuff links, and medals.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from Coins and Medals, Yale University Art Gallery, 2002.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Ephemera Collection is by appointment only. Contact the Head of Public Services or the Public Services Manager.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ephemera Collection. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged by type of material: Cloth, Metal, and Paper/Wood

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains primarily political, military, and commemorative ephemera, including but not limited to pins, ribbons, buttons, cuff links, and medals.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: See also: Box 12, Folder 26 - 32 See also: Box 13, Folder 33 - 35

did.unittitle: Columbus, Christopher, voyage to America quadricentennial
Dewey, George, return from Spanish-American War
Edward VII, King of the United Kingdom, coronation
Grant, General Ulysses S., monuments honoring
Hudson, Henry [including Hudson-Fulton celebration and commemoration of the discovery of Lake Champlain]
Organizations [including Elks, Shriners, A.F.L.-C.I.O., Red Cross, United Service Organizations, Hadassah, and others]
Morris, Charles G. [primarily materials associated with ice cream manufacturers]
Social issues [includes women's suffrage, abortion, peace, the environment, homosexuality, and mental illness]
"Radio photo message...during period of nearest approach of Mars to the Earth"
